finding: Mandatory template docs/templates/matlab_run_template.m passes wrapper precheck but fails validator (CHECK_HEADER and CHECK_FUNCTION).
evidence: Precheck PASS + validator FAIL for docs template; validator output: CHECK_HEADER and CHECK_FUNCTION.
workflow_effect: New script authors following the mandatory template get blocked before first run.

finding: Mandatory template calls [runDir, runId] = createRunContext(...), but createRunContext returns one struct output.
workflow_effect: Template-driven scripts are likely to error at runtime even if static checks pass.

finding: templates/canonical_runnable_script.m fails both precheck and validator.
evidence: Precheck FAIL (missing execution_status/createRunContext/csv/md) and validator FAIL.
workflow_effect: Repository ships examples that are not runnable under current rules.

topic: Pass likelihood for new run scripts
finding: Only 4/30 root run_*.m pass precheck and 6/30 pass validator.
evidence: PRECHECK_TOTAL=30 PASS=4 FAIL=26; VALIDATOR PASS=6 FAIL=24.
workflow_effect: New scripts are likely to be blocked without expert rule knowledge.

finding: 17/30 run_*.m are wrapper-named files, and 0/17 pass precheck or validator.
workflow_effect: Users can easily choose non-runnable entry scripts by name.

finding: Soft precheck requires writetable+csv string and catches writecell-based CSV flows as failures.
evidence: Top precheck reasons: no CSV writetable=21, missing createRunContext=20, missing execution_status=20.
workflow_effect: Valid script patterns get blocked before validator/MATLAB.

finding: Validator blocks 24/30 root run scripts; top fails are CHECK_RUN_CONTEXT, REQUIRED_OUTPUTS, CHECK_DRIFT, CHECK_HEADER.
evidence: Reason counts: REQUIRED_OUTPUTS=20 CHECK_RUN_CONTEXT=20 CHECK_DRIFT=20 CHECK_HEADER=19.
workflow_effect: Execution pipeline often stops at validation.

evidence: tools/run_matlab_safe.bat line 106 sets timeoutSeconds=300; EXECUTION_READINESS.md estimates 50-65 minutes.
workflow_effect: Long but valid research runs are terminated early.

finding: Wrapper falls back to directory scanning when run_dir_pointer is missing, while run contract forbids scanning.
evidence: tools/run_matlab_safe.bat line 123 fallback scan vs docs/run_system.md line 117 forbids directory scanning.

finding: Soft precheck writes shared files at repo root tables/reports, not run-scoped files.
workflow_effect: Concurrent or repeated runs can overwrite diagnostics and create stale/mixed feedback.

finding: Across 692 run directories, 0 have status file plus csv+md plus figures or figure manifest together.
workflow_effect: Typical outputs are not one-step complete for research handoff.
Run success/failure is often not machine-readable at the expected location.

finding: No figure manifest detected and status-producing runs do not generate figures by default.
workflow_effect: Users often need additional reruns/scripts to get publication-ready visuals.

finding: Run metadata backbone is mostly present (manifest/config/log/notes in most runs).
evidence: HAS_MANIFEST=658 HAS_CONFIG=640 HAS_LOG=645 HAS_NOTES=647 out of 692.
workflow_effect: Traceability is better than output usability; foundation exists for improvement.
